element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players establish beat-em-up mechanics without weapons
Each level enforces strict time limit to defeat enemies and progress
Two car chase stages: one in movie world, one in real world
Climactic showdown with Mr. Benedict (film's primary villain)

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating level enemies within time limit
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Time-limit driven pacing with escalating challenge through enemy variety and vehicle sequences

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden developer message in background layers (Background Layer 1 and Layer 3) accessible only with Game Genie codes

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic melee combat with time pressure introduction
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Vehicle chase sequences introducing alternate gameplay
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters with Mr. Benedict climax

notable_level_patterns.description: Side-scrolling combat against multiple enemies with strict time limit; no weapons allowed per Schwarzenegger's content restrictions
Overhead driving segment breaking from beat-em-up formula; two instances total in game (movie world and real world)
Climactic showdown with primary antagonist Mr. Benedict concluding the narrative arc

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Last Action Hero SNES)
